mapper.select:
SELECT ev.id as siteEventsId, ev.sort, ev.updater, ev.updated_time, info.sport_type, info.league_name_cs as leagueName, info.league_id, info.id FROM sport_events_info info INNER join site_events ev ON ev.events_info_id = info.id and ev.site_code = #{siteCode} AND ev.id is not null
where 1=1
AND info.sport_type = #{vo.sportType}
order by ev.sort
